introSection: Joker Funhouse Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was one of five new rides opened in 2004.

The ride was formerly known as Wile E. Coyote Canyon Blaster until the theme was changed for the 2016 season due to the opening of the DC Super Friends kids area.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.

fullText:
Joker Funhouse Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA.

The coaster was one of five new rides opened in 2004.

The ride was formerly known as Wile E. Coyote Canyon Blaster until the theme was changed for the 2016 season due to the opening of the DC Super Friends kids area.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.
